name: PBRPushConstants
description: Push-constant layout for the default PBR material. Used by the main PBR graphics pipelines to pass per-mesh material data (colors, roughness, texture indices, UV transforms) to the GPU without per-object uniform buffers.
usage: Register this layout via MaterialSystem.register_layout_from_json and use it when creating MaterialInstances for PBR meshes. Property names must match what the engine and shaders expect so set_property/set_texture can locate the correct offsets.

pipeline.notes: Push-constant range must be defined in the pipeline layout with size >= push_constant_size and offset 0.

push_constant_description: Total size in bytes of the push-constant block as seen by Vulkan and the shaders. Must match sizeof(PBRPushConstants) in Zig and the corresponding struct in the shader.

properties.name: modelMatrix
properties.description: Per-mesh world transform (4x4 matrix). Used to transform vertices from local to world space in the vertex shader.
properties.usage: Set once per draw call based on the mesh or entity transform. Typically filled by higher-level render code, not by gameplay scripts.

properties.name: albedoFactor
properties.description: Base color tint (RGBA). Multiplies the sampled albedo texture or acts as a flat color when no texture is bound.
properties.usage: Set from material authoring UI or imported material data such as glTF baseColorFactor.

properties.name: emissiveFactor
properties.description: Emissive color (RGB). Controls glow color emitted by the material.
properties.usage: Used for self-illuminated surfaces like lights, screens, and emissive details.

properties.name: roughnessFactor
properties.description: Surface roughness in the range [0, 1]. Lower values are glossy, higher values are diffuse.
properties.usage: Mapped from material definitions or edited in the material editor.

properties.name: metallicNormalAO
properties.description: Packed scalar factors: x = metallic, y = normal scale, z = ambient occlusion strength, w = alpha cutoff threshold.
properties.usage: Controls PBR response (metallic), normal map strength, AO contribution, and alpha test threshold for masked materials.

properties.name: albedoTextureIndex
properties.description: Bindless index into the global texture array for the albedo or base color texture.
properties.usage: Provided by the texture or bindless system. Materials set this via set_texture or during import.

properties.name: normalTextureIndex
properties.description: Bindless index for the normal map texture.
properties.usage: Enables per-pixel normal mapping when a normal map is available.

properties.name: metallicRoughnessTextureIndex
properties.description: Bindless index for the packed metallic and roughness texture.
properties.usage: Used in physically based shading to vary metallic and roughness across the surface.

properties.name: aoTextureIndex
properties.description: Bindless index for the ambient occlusion texture.
properties.usage: Modulates indirect lighting to darken creases and cavities.

properties.name: emissiveTextureIndex
properties.description: Bindless index for the emissive texture.
properties.usage: Combined with emissiveFactor to drive emissive contribution in the lighting pass.

properties.name: packedInfo
properties.description: Bit-packed flags and UV set indices. Lower 16 bits store UV indices for each texture; upper 16 bits store feature flags such as skeletal animation or descriptor indexing.
properties.usage: Filled by engine-side utilities. The shader decodes this to choose the correct UV channels and runtime features.

properties.name: textureTransforms
properties.description: Array of 5 vec4 entries. Each entry packs texture transform data: xy = offset, zw = scale for a specific texture slot (albedo, normal, metallic-roughness, AO, emissive).
properties.usage: Used to pan and scale textures per material or per layer, for UV tiling and offsets.

properties.name: textureRotations
properties.description: Array of 5 floats. Each value stores a rotation angle in radians for the corresponding texture slot.
properties.usage: Allows rotating individual textures (for example rotating a normal map or decal) without changing mesh UVs.

properties.name: emissiveStrength
properties.usage: Separates color (emissiveFactor) from brightness. Useful for boosting glow without changing hue.
